menu.description: Premium business tools connected in one unified ERP platform.

Footer.description: Unified apps for finance, sales, operations, and growth in one connected ERP platform.

metadata.title: Home | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Run finance, sales, operations and customer service from one connected ERP platform.

hero.title: Run your business faster with <accent>clarity, control and automation</accent>
hero.description: Adon ERP brings finance, sales, inventory, HR and customer support into one modern workspace so your team can move faster without juggling disconnected tools.

points.pointOne: English and Bangla support from the same platform
points.pointTwo: One source of truth for teams, stock and revenue
points.pointThree: Launch quickly and scale without rebuilding workflows

orders.label: Orders
orders.note: Sales, POS and web orders in one queue

support.label: Support SLA
support.note: Average first response for open tickets

highlight.label: Why teams switch
highlight.text: Instead of stitching together five separate products, you manage operations from one clean system with shared data.

platform.title: The core tools your team uses every day
platform.description: Start with the modules you need now and expand over time without replacing your data, your processes or your reporting stack.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Control accounting, invoices, cash flow and expenses with one reliable source of financial truth.

sales.title: Sales
sales.description: Track leads, quotations, POS activity and renewals from first contact to recurring revenue.

operations.title: Operations
operations.description: Keep stock, procurement and fulfillment aligned so teams can deliver faster with fewer errors.

people.title: People
people.description: Handle recruitment, attendance, time off and employee records from one structured workspace.

commerce.title: Commerce
commerce.description: Run your website, product catalog, customer communication and online sales from the same backend.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Make better decisions with dashboards and KPIs that pull from the same live business data.

workflow.title: A rollout that is practical, not disruptive
workflow.description: You do not need a massive transformation project to start. The platform is designed to land in phases and produce value quickly.

discover.title: Map your current workflow
discover.description: We identify the processes that create friction today and define a rollout that matches your business priorities.

launch.title: Go live with the essentials
launch.description: Finance, sales or inventory can launch first, while the rest of the system stays aligned for the next phase.

scale.title: Expand with confidence
scale.description: As your team grows, add more apps, automations and reports without replatforming from scratch.

industries.title: Configured for the way different businesses actually operate
industries.description: Retail, manufacturing, service teams and education programs all need different workflows. Adon ERP adapts without turning into a custom-code mess.

retail.title: Retail
retail.description: Connect stock, POS, eCommerce and customer follow-up from one operational view.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Plan materials, production and delivery with real visibility into cost and capacity.

services.title: Services
services.description: Manage projects, appointments, timesheets and support without losing context between teams.

education.title: Education
education.description: Support training programs, learning content and operational coordination from one platform.

trust.title: One platform means fewer blind spots
trust.description: When accounting, operations and customer-facing teams all rely on the same system, decisions get faster and reporting stops turning into guesswork.
trust.quote: We stopped reconciling data between separate tools every week. Now finance, operations and support all work from the same numbers.
trust.author: Operations leadership

cta.title: Move to a cleaner ERP setup without breaking your momentum
cta.description: Start with a focused rollout, keep your teams aligned, and scale into a full platform when the business is ready.
